message.content:
I need to understand how the root search list renders items in App.tsx. Read:
1. src/App.tsx - focus on how search filtering works, how sections/items are rendered, and where I'd inject a calculator result at the top
2. src/types.ts - to understand ListItemData and related types
3. src/components/list/list_item/list_item.tsx - to understand how items render
4. src/components/icons/icons.tsx - to find the CalculatorIcon

Provide the key findings: how search filtering works, how sections are built, what data structures are used, and the full CalculatorIcon component.

content.text: I'll read those files to understand the search list rendering architecture.

content.content:
1→import { type IconProps } from './icon_shared';
     2→
     3→const DEFAULTS = { size: 20 };
     4→
     5→function svgBase(props: IconProps) {
     6→  const s = props.size ?? DEFAULTS.size;
     7→  return {
     8→    width: s,
     9→    height: s,
    10→    viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    11→    xmlns: 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',
    12→    className: props.className,
    13→  };
    14→}
    15→
    16→const WHITE_STROKE = {
    17→  stroke: '#FFFFFF',
    18→  strokeWidth: 1.5,
    19→  strokeLinecap: 'round' as const,
    20→  strokeLinejoin: 'round' as const,
    21→  fill: 'none',
    22→};
    23→
    24→export function ClipboardIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    25→  return (
    26→    <svg {...svgBase(props)}>
    27→      <defs>
    28→        <linearGradient id="clipboard-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    29→          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#FFD60A" />
    30→          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#FF9F0A" />
    31→        </linearGradient>
    32→      </defs>
    33→      <rect
    34→        x="1"
    35→        y="1"
    36→        width="18"
    37→        height="18"
    38→        rx="4"
    39→        fill="url(#clipboard-bg)"
    40→      />
    41→      <rect
    42→        x="7"
    43→        y="4"
    44→        width="6"
    45→        height="2"
    46→        rx="0.75"
    47→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    48→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    49→      />
    50→      <rect
    51→        x="5.5"
    52→        y="5.5"
    53→        width="9"
    54→        height="10"
    55→        rx="1.5"
    56→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    57→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    58→      />
    59→      <line
    60→        x1="7.5"
    61→        y1="9.5"
    62→        x2="12.5"
    63→        y2="9.5"
    64→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    65→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    66→      />
    67→      <line
    68→        x1="7.5"
    69→        y1="12"
    70→        x2="11"
    71→        y2="12"
    72→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    73→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    74→      />
    75→    </svg>
    76→  );
    77→}
    78→

    97→        x="4.5"

    99→        width="11"
   100→        height="11"
